Projection assumes the 1.5%/week growth target on deployed capital once the ~$111 cash is routed to the ETF tier. Recalibrates each Friday as deposit-free performance history accumulates.

intelligence_evolution.summary: Established the 3-tier framework and first positions across semis + innovation ETF. Live signal engine came online (33 tickers). Completed the first full stop-loss cycle (MRVL -5.71%) and handled a same-session $100 deposit via tier-based routing. The compound entry gate reversed a thesis-only over-promotion (PANW), proving the quant layer blocks momentum chasing.
intelligence_evolution.key_insight: Two systems validated under fire this week: (1) the stop-loss loop executed end-to-end on a fractional position via agentic market sell, and (2) the compound entry gate caught an overbought false-promote that pure thesis logic would have entered. Sector rotation (semis→software) exposed the book's semi concentration — accelerating the §13 ETF migration.
intelligence_evolution.next_phase: Phase 2 — Pattern Recognition (target: 10 sessions, 3+ medium/high patterns, 1 complete stop-loss cycle — the MRVL cycle satisfies the last criterion)

strategy_dna.note: Hard guardrail. Never evaluated, never overridden.
Enforced pre-trade via get_portfolio. No exceptions.
Promotion to Predicted Victory requires 3 thesis gates AND ≥3/5 quant criteria. Reversed PANW's thesis-only promotion (1/5) this week.
Fractional positions use manual/agentic market-sell checks each session. MRVL -5% executed cleanly at $263.11.
New capital routes to the most underweight tier vs stage targets (DRIP > ETF > Stock tiebreak). $100 deposit → ETF tier (8.6% vs 50%).
New entries at AM open only. AH and mid-session are analysis/planning — no new entries.
No market orders on gap-ups >2%. Queue limit 2-3% below open, or hold cash.
Dollar-amount market orders for all fractional buys. Limit/conditional orders require whole shares.
MRVL→SOXX (triggered by stop-out), ARKK→QQQ (+10%), INTC→SOXX (+15%). Shifting the book toward an ETF-anchored model to cut single-name noise.

risk_profile.notes: Cash buffer jumped to 74.8% after the $100 deposit + MRVL exit — large dry powder, strong optionality, but the deployed book is still 2 semis (INTC, NVDA) + 1 innovation ETF (ARKK), so deployed-capital concentration stays semi-heavy. The planned ETF-tier routing (SOXX/QQQ) directly reduces this. NVDA sits in its stop-zone.

weekly_recap.summary: Week 1 value change is dominated by a $100 deposit — underlying market performance was about -$1.5 (one stop-loss + a semiconductor rotation), so the +195.6% headline is a capital injection, not a return. Operationally a strong week: live signal engine online, first complete stop-loss cycle (MRVL -5.71%, thesis intact → SOXX redeploy), compound gate reversed a false PANW promotion, and CRWD earned a clean PV promotion. ARKK is the only green holding (+0.57%); NVDA sits in its stop-zone. Heads into next week with $111 dry powder earmarked for ETF-tier diversification.
